ddls:
CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart (e.g., UK Singles Chart) */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., Singles, Albums) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chart */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the chart was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the song */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher who released the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the artist is from */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist's music */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label the artist is signed to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the publisher is based in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart */,
  "chart_date" TEXT /* Date of the chart entry */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position of the song on the chart */,
  "last_week_position" INTEGER /* Position of the song on the chart last week */,
  "peak_position" INTEGER /* Peak position of the song on the chart */,
  "weeks_on_chart" INTEGER /* Number of weeks the song has been on the chart */,
  "streaming_data" TEXT /* Streaming data for the song (e.g., Spotify, Apple Music) */,
  "sales_data" TEXT /* Sales data for the song (e.g., album sales, single sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_entries_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_entries_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart entry */,
  "chart_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical entry */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the song on the chart */,
  "last_week_position" INTEGER /* Position of the song on the chart last week */,
  "peak_position" INTEGER /* Peak position of the song on the chart */,
  "weeks_on_chart" INTEGER /* Number of weeks the song has been on the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_history_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES chart_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, marketer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to generate the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV, Database) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source is updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the search query */,
  "query" TEXT /* Search query made by the user */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date the search query was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
